decisions.rationale: The source is the Fall 2011 Nostrand/Rogers SBS newsletter. Block p001_c0014 in the 'Proposed SBS Design on Rogers Avenue' section explicitly describes TSP as an SBS feature.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs are part of the SBS station design on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs at SBS stations on Nostrand Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs at SBS stations on Rogers Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic.

decisions.rationale: Block p002_c0009 under 'Final Design of SBS Stations' explicitly lists bus bulbs as a station design element for the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.
